packs.label: Regulated Bank Internal Scoping Base
packs.narrative: Internal-bank base pack for compliance, risk, security, technology, cloud, audit, operational resilience, and third-party owners.
packs.fitNote: Use as the default base pack when an internal regulated bank needs blank scoping templates.

packs.label: DORA Bank Resilience
packs.narrative: DORA resilience and TLPT-ready scoping for critical ICT systems, functions, and third-party ICT dependencies.
packs.fitNote: Use when DORA testing, ICT function mapping, or threat-led scoping drives the internal bank evidence pack.

packs.label: PRA CBEST UK Bank Resilience
packs.narrative: UK Prudential Regulation Authority CBEST scoping for intelligence-led penetration testing.
packs.fitNote: Use for UK financial institutions requiring CBEST or STAR-FS assessments.

packs.label: HKMA iCAST Hong Kong Framework
packs.narrative: Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative (CFI) iCAST scoping.
packs.fitNote: Use for HKMA regulated entities undergoing intelligence-led cyber attack simulation.

packs.label: Federal Reserve Board (FRB) Supervision
packs.narrative: US Federal Reserve Board (FRB) banking supervision and SR 13-1 oversight scoping.
packs.fitNote: Use for institutions under FRB regulatory supervision requiring security validation.

packs.label: Global Regulated Enterprise (DORA, PRA, HKMA)
packs.narrative: A unified global compliance scoping document strictly consolidating DORA TLPT, PRA CBEST, and HKMA iCAST requirements.
packs.fitNote: Use for global enterprises requiring unified compliance scoping.

packs.label: APAC Regulated Enterprise (APRA, MAS, HKMA)
packs.narrative: A unified Asia-Pacific compliance scoping document consolidating APRA (Australia), MAS (Singapore), and HKMA (Hong Kong) requirements.
packs.fitNote: Use for global enterprises operating across the APAC region requiring unified compliance scoping.

packs.label: US State & Federal Regulated Entity (NYDFS, FRB, FFIEC)
packs.narrative: A unified US compliance scoping document consolidating New York State (NYDFS) and Federal (FRB, FFIEC) regulatory expectations.
packs.fitNote: Use for US financial institutions operating in highly regulated jurisdictions like New York.
